check_trace_enabled: check if debug tracing is enabled by reading the CODER_FEATURE_DEBUG_TRACE environment variable
get_trace_directory: get the debug trace output directory path from the CODER_DEBUG_TRACE_DIR environment variable
write_trace_event: write a JSONL trace event for a session to the debug trace directory when tracing is enabled
enable_debug_tracing: enable debug tracing by setting the CODER_FEATURE_DEBUG_TRACE environment variable to 1
inspect_trace_output: inspect JSONL trace files in the trace directory to review session events and tool selection
